title: The OpenVisi AI Visibility Benchmark Preview Prompt Pack
description: Prompt categories for a future reproducible AI Visibility benchmark. This file does not contain collected answer data.

categories.label: Category discovery prompts
promptTemplates: What are the leading {category} tools for {audience}?

categories.label: Alternative/comparison prompts
promptTemplates: What are the best alternatives to {targetEntity}?

categories.label: Brand-specific prompts
promptTemplates: What does {targetEntity} do, and who is it for?

categories.label: Buyer-intent prompts
promptTemplates: Which {category} product should I choose for {buyerNeed}?
What should a {buyerType} consider before choosing {targetEntity}?

limitations: This preview prompt pack does not include collected AI-generated answers.
Future benchmark runs must record model, surface, date, prompt pack version, and methodology version.
Results should be interpreted directionally in early versions.
